name: @imqueue/pg-prisma
description: Prisma/Postgres toolkit for Node.js & TypeScript microservices — query extensions (soft-delete, audit, authorship, access-scope), row archiving, change-notify triggers, down-migrations, and a Prisma generator for typed @imqueue/rpc models (the @imqueue framework)

scripts.clean-compiled: npm run clean-js && npm run clean-typedefs && npm run clean-maps
scripts.test-lcov: npm run build && mkdir -p coverage && node --enable-source-maps --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=coverage/lcov.info --test-timeout=15000 $(find test -name '*.spec.js'); node scripts/strip-comment-coverage.mjs coverage/lcov.info
scripts.test-coverage-html: npm run test-lcov; genhtml coverage/lcov.info --output-directory coverage/html --ignore-errors inconsistent,corrupt,format,mismatch && echo "Coverage report: file://$(pwd)/coverage/html/index.html"
scripts.test-dev: npm run test && npm run clean-js && npm run clean-typedefs && npm run clean-maps
scripts.clean: npm run clean-tests && npm run clean-typedefs && npm run clean-maps && npm run clean-js

author: imqueue.com <support@imqueue.com> (https://imqueue.com)
